hero.lede: All of QS Technology's technical documentation — product catalogues, operation and installation manuals for each controller model, plus software & data updates. Click to download directly.

catalogue.heading: Catalogue & profile
catalogue.desc: The full catalogue covering every F-series and Astro-series controller line, plus the company profile. Vietnamese and English editions.

operation.heading: Operation manuals
operation.desc: Manuals for operators: HMI operation, machining parameter setup, programming, and handling common alarms on each model.

installation.heading: Installation manuals
installation.desc: Wiring and cabinet-installation standards: pin diagrams, servo/inverter connections, I/O configuration, and initial commissioning steps.

software.heading: Software & data
software.desc: The QSL Editor and QS Explorer tools for editing, backing up and loading controller data, plus the data-update package for the F54 model.

plc.heading: Advanced PLC documents
plc.body: Some special documents — detailed wiring diagrams, sample ladder source, advanced troubleshooting — are provided exclusively to customers with a technical-service contract.

macro.heading: Need another document?
macro.body: Need a specific document that isn't in the public library — EPLAN drawings, sample G-code, training videos? The QS technical team will email it within 24 hours.
